messages.content: Hi, how are you? I'm John. I'm trying to better understand the arguments people use when deciding whether to buy DELIGHT, a yogurt product.
Got it—what have you noticed people doing with DELIGHT? Like, do you see it showing up a lot in carts or fridges around you, or is it more of a niche pick?
When you say “b,” do you mean you’ve seen it around a bit but not everywhere? Where are you noticing it most—at the store, at work/school, or with friends/family?
I’m not sure what “c” stands for in your view. Are you leaning toward trying DELIGHT because it seems like a lot of people are buying it, or are you still not seeing enough of it to feel confident?

If “d” means you’re doubtful, that makes sense. What would make it feel like a safer bet to you—seeing more people consistently choosing it, or hearing a few real “I buy this every week” type experiences?
If “e” is basically “either way,” I’m with you—I’d want a clearer signal from what people actually do. Do you know anyone who regularly buys DELIGHT, or have you only seen it occasionally on shelves?
